title: Epic 3D Beds
description: This texture will make your game bed look 3D.
body:
![Epic 3D Beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9a726332bbfe4442032a491373e27ccff67332e_0.webp)

**EPIC 3D Beds** transforms Minecraft beds into highly detailed models with realistic depth and full 3D styling. Each bed gains enhanced shapes, richer shadows, and a much more immersive look, making your interiors feel more modern and visually impressive. Perfect for players who love stylish builds, taking beautiful screenshots, or simply giving their world a more epic appearance.

## 🌟 Highlights

* Fully 3D models with enhanced visual quality
* More realistic details while keeping the classic Minecraft feel
* Ideal for decoration, screenshots, and immersive worlds

## 🔧 Requirement

* **OptiFine is required** for the 3D models to work correctly
